cross_task.dependency_graph_notes: Edges: 1→2→3. Tasks 4 and 5 independent (depends_on=[]). No cycles. All depends_on references valid task numbers.
cross_task.wave_correctness_notes: Task 1 wave=1, Task 2 wave=2 (>1, depends_on=[1]), Task 3 wave=3 (>2, depends_on=[2]), Tasks 4 and 5 wave=3 (no deps, parallel). All wave > max(depends_on wave). Matches tech-spec wave structure.
cross_task.file_ownership_notes: Per-wave file disjointness preserved: Wave 1 → ErrorLog.kt + test; Wave 2 → ModelRegistry.kt, DefaultModelRegistry.kt, ResetReason.kt + test; Wave 3 → ChatViewModel.kt (Task 3) + MainActivity.kt + CrashReportActivity.kt (Task 4) + patterns.md (Task 5) — all disjoint. ChatViewModel.kt re-touched in Wave 4 by Task 6 (out of this batch) — serialised across waves per tech-spec.
cross_task.shared_resources_notes: Tech-spec Shared Resources table lists Engine (owner: DefaultModelRegistry.initialize, pre-existing), Conversation (owner: LlmChatModelHelper.initialize / .resetConversation, pre-existing — Task 2 modifies the reset call site, not the owner), lifecycleMutex (owner: DefaultModelRegistry singleton, pre-existing). No new shared resource introduced; no competing instances; consumer dependencies (Task 3 → Task 2 for ResetReason+signature) declared correctly.
cross_task.carry_forward_notes: All AC items from user-spec covered: AC-1.1/1.2 (Task 3), AC-1.3a (Tasks 2+3), AC-1.3b (Task 3), AC-1.4 (Tasks 1+2), AC-1.5 (Tasks 1+2+3+5), AC-2.1/2.3 (Task 6 — out of batch, but acknowledged), AC-2.2 (Task 3 satisfies via existing data flow), AC-3.1/3.2/3.3 (Task 4). Tech-spec Implementation Tasks 1–5 map 1:1 to task files 1.md–5.md. Tech-spec Testing Strategy entries: ErrorLogTest 4 tests → all in Task 1; DefaultModelRegistryTest 7 tests → all in Task 2; ChatViewModelTest 9 entries → all in Task 3 (engineReady_combinatorics correctly deferred to Task 6 by tech-spec wave assignment).
cross_task.decomposition_proportionality: 5 tasks for 3 user-stories + 8 acceptance-criteria-clusters from user-spec; full feature has 10 tasks (6 implementation + 3 audit + 1 QA). Reasonable for size=S bugfix; not over-decomposed.

summary: All 5 tasks approved. Frontmatter correct in all. R1 verify-mode compliance verified per hints (Tasks 1/2/5 = [smoke] backend/doc, Tasks 3/4 = [smoke, user] with verify-user steps targeting pre-existing or task-delivered UI only). All sections present per template; non-applicable TDD Anchors correctly omitted in Tasks 4 and 5. Carry-forward from tech-spec complete: every AC and every TDD test entry from tech-spec Testing Strategy is reflected in the assigned task. Dependency graph acyclic and wave-consistent. Shared resources have correct ownership. Only minor stylistic findings (4 total): 3 instances of absolute Windows paths in Reviewers sections (Tasks 2, 3, 5) where the template uses project-relative paths, and 1 path inconsistency for project-knowledge links in Task 3 (references/ subdirectory vs root). Zero critical, zero major findings.
